config.enable-debug.tooltip: Enable detailed debug logging. Disable for cleaner console output.
config.compare-quality.tooltip: If enabled, filters will check item quality as well as item ID
config.transfer-interval.tooltip: How often the item transfer logic runs in frames (1 = every frame, 60 = every second)
config.grab-automate-chest-group.tooltip: Grab all chests in Automate Group if the input chest is part of one (requires Automate mod)
